subcodes.title: Words to the editor of the Police Journal, spoken on 1912-09-17
subcodes.first_line: A newspaper must in the first instance be the means of creating harmony among the people.
subcodes.first_line_orig: روزنامه باید اول وسیلهٴ الفت بین نفوس باشد این اعظم وظائف صاحبان جرائد است که سوء تفاهم
subcodes.subjects: @newspapers and the media; publications, @unity; oneness of humanity, @race unity; racial issues
